name: Wooden Abacus Toy - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
This Wooden Abacus Toy from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia will keep your little one entertained during playtime. This toy features a wooden abacus that stands 12.5 inches high, complete with over 100 multicolored plastic beads to help develop problem-solving and fine motor skills. With its simple yet engaging design, the wooden abacus toy is suitable for ages 0-12 years.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
